NPS_Unit.UnitCode: MANDATORY for Data Store: NPS Alpha Unit Code (ACAD)
NPS_Unit.UnitType: MANDATORY for Data Store: NPS Unit Type (National Park, National Monument, etc)

dataIdInfo.idAbs: In recognition of the critical need for the quality assurance of locational data, the DEP GIS Program has instituted data documentation standards for the development and maintenance of the Department's geographically referenced point data. This standard requires site identification and location documentation fields, populated by standard data documentation codes, be applied to DEP production and development level point data, regardless of scale or extent. This standard provides documentation necessary to assess the type and quality of point locations, as well as to track the locational history of a point feature in GIS. This standard was developed in accordance with EPA's current standard for documenting locational data.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: Stores feature level metadata for DEP public water supply (PWS) datalayer (PWSDEP_PT)

LegConsts.useLimit: See access and use constraints information.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: ArcGIS 10.2 Enterprise Geodatabase/Oracle 12c Enterprise Edition Release 12.1.0.2.0 - 64bit

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
